def test_mapreduce_runs_successfully():
        """Running mapreduce.py with python3 must exit with returncode 0."""
        result = subprocess.run(
            ["python3", MAPREDUCE_FILE],
            capture_output=True,
            text=True,
            timeout=120,
        )
